title: Who this guide applies to
description: Find out if this guide applies to you.
keywords: Truck driver tax deductions, Truck driver deductions, truckie, overnight allowance truck drivers, road train drivers, long haul drivers, transporters, trucker, tip truck driver, tax claims for truck driving

content_blocks.text: When we say employee truck driver, we mean an employee who drives a large and heavy vehicle used for transporting articles or goods.

items: 'local driver', who usually travels within a city or town and sleeps at home after completing their work
'short-haul driver', who usually travels between cities and towns but returns home to sleep after completing their work
'long-haul driver', who sleeps away from home as a long rest break (7 continuous hours or more) is mandatory as part of their work.

content_text:
When we say employee truck driver, we mean an employee who drives a large and heavy vehicle used for transporting articles or goods.
Truck drivers can be a:
- 'local driver', who usually travels within a city or town and sleeps at home after completing their work
- 'short-haul driver', who usually travels between cities and towns but returns home to sleep after completing their work
- 'long-haul driver', who sleeps away from home as a long rest break (7 continuous hours or more) is mandatory as part of their work.
